judge_findings.rule: Declared folders in the constitution must exist on disk.
judge_findings.evidence: CLAUDE.md lists `archive/` but no such directory exists.
judge_findings.suggested_action: Create archive/ or drop it from the declared folder list.

judge_findings.rule: Pinned reference docs should be refreshed within the declared window.
judge_findings.evidence: reference/pinned-map.md frontmatter date is well past the window.
judge_findings.suggested_action: Review reference/pinned-map.md and refresh or re-pin it.

judge_findings.rule: Each fact has exactly one source of truth.
judge_findings.evidence: projects/alpha/STATE.md and projects/beta/STATE.md both claim ownership of the same milestone.
judge_findings.suggested_action: Mark one as contested and reconcile to a single owner.

linter_requires_decision.issue: Filename does not match the declared naming pattern.
linter_requires_decision.suggested_action: Rename to the dated convention, e.g. `note bad-name 2026-01-01.md`.

linter_requires_decision.issue: Basename STATE.md appears in two or more directories.
linter_requires_decision.suggested_action: Confirm both are intentional or consolidate them.
